parameters.jsonBody: {"message": "You are in EVOLUTIONARY_TEST_MODE. Steps: 1) query_supabase table=agent_insights select=title,detail limit=1 order_by=created_at order_desc=true to find the last NEXT_TEST directive in the detail field. 2) Execute EXACTLY that next test using search_and_execute with the specific tool mentioned. If no NEXT_TEST found start with: search_and_execute task=get top 5 search queries for sc-domain:penantia.com last 7 days. 3) Evaluate the result - did it work and was correct data returned. 4) write_supabase with insight_type=tool_pattern title=[TOOL]: [pass or fail] detail=Result: [summary]. NEXT_TEST: search_and_execute task=[exact next task]. Rotate through: GSC queries then GSC pages then Gmail fetch then GitHub file read then GA traffic. Never repeat the same test twice in a row.", "session_id": "auto-test-loop"}
